name: /pr-corpus-update resets the per-source budget when the stored date differs from today per L-7 per-day semantics
command: printf '%s' '{"cfpb-consumerfinance":{"used_today":100000,"date":"2026-05-24"}}' > b.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --estimated-tokens 1000 --budget b.json --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'budget_reset=true' out.txt && echo reset 1>&2
